channel.title: AirPods Max 2 on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AirPods Max 2 on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple AirPods Max 2 at $449: Why the Price Drop Matters
item.description: Apple's AirPods Max 2 fall to $449 at Amazon and Best Buy, a $100 discount. We examine the H2 chip, USB‑C, and why this price cut matters for audio.

item.title: AirPods Max 2 Price Drop
item.description: Amazon drops AirPods Max 2 price to $399 ahead of Prime Day

item.title: AirPods Max 2 Drop to $399 – Prime Day Deal Alert!
item.description: Get the latest AirPods Max 2 at a record low price of $399 on Amazon. Prime Day deal in Starlight color with fast delivery options.
